title: Sowmiya Anbumani (PMK) wins Dharmapuri by 20,896 votes, defeats TVK
summary: PMK's Sowmiya Anbumani won the Dharmapuri Assembly seat by 20,896 votes, holding off a determined TVK challenge in what observers called the year's most-watched contest.

title: AIADMK's K.P. Anbalagan retains Palacode for 5th term
summary: AIADMK veteran K.P. Anbalagan retained Palacode for a fifth consecutive term, making it one of the most stable constituencies in Dharmapuri district across cycles.

title: PMK's G.K. Mani wins Pennagaram by 11,340 votes, thanks Vanniyar consolidation
summary: PMK strongman G.K. Mani returned to the assembly from Pennagaram with an 11,340-vote margin and credited a sharp Vanniyar community consolidation for the win.

title: Pappireddippatti PMK's A. Govindasamy defeats TVK by 8,760 votes
summary: Pappireddippatti's PMK candidate A. Govindasamy defeated TVK by 8,760 votes after a hard-fought contest, with the party calling the result a Vanniyar belt mandate.

title: Harur DMK's Sampath Kumar wins SC reserved seat, beats AIADMK by 5,230 votes
summary: DMK's Sampath Kumar held the Harur SC reserved constituency by a 5,230-vote margin, the party's lone bright spot in an otherwise difficult district outing.

title: TVK finishes second in Dharmapuri and Pappireddippatti — 'moral victory' says party
summary: TVK finished second in both Dharmapuri and Pappireddippatti and called the performance a 'moral victory' for a debut effort, signalling future contestability in the belt.

title: Hogenakkal Phase-II water scheme: PMK seeks early implementation
summary: PMK has formally sought early implementation of the Hogenakkal Phase-II water scheme, with both Dharmapuri and Pennagaram MLAs taking up the issue immediately after the result.

title: Dharmapuri-Morappur railway line work inspected by new MLA
summary: The newly-elected Dharmapuri MLA Sowmiya Anbumani inspected ongoing work on the Dharmapuri-Morappur railway line on May 5 and pushed for an accelerated completion timeline.

title: Palacode-Thali road widening project gets AIADMK support
summary: Palacode's re-elected AIADMK MLA K.P. Anbalagan has thrown his weight behind the long-pending Palacode-Thali road widening project, calling it a critical inter-district link.

title: Pennagaram tank desilting work begins after PMK intervention
summary: Desilting works at major Pennagaram tanks began this week following PMK's intervention with the Public Works Department to prepare for the upcoming southwest monsoon.

title: Harur SIPCOT industrial park expansion awaits clearance
summary: The proposed Harur SIPCOT industrial park expansion is now awaiting environment and land clearances, with the new MLA committing to chase down approvals on priority.

title: Sowmiya Anbumani promises free laptop scheme for government college students
summary: Dharmapuri MLA Sowmiya Anbumani announced a free laptop scheme for government college students from the constituency, modelled on past PMK welfare programmes.

title: TVK's Dharmapuri unit says 'will target local body polls in 2027'
summary: TVK's Dharmapuri district unit said the party would now target the 2027 local body polls with a focused outreach in Vanniyar-majority villages where it finished a strong second.

title: PMK retains dominance in Vanniyar belt, wins 3 out of 5 seats
summary: PMK won three of Dharmapuri's five Assembly seats, retaining its dominant influence across the Vanniyar belt and signalling strength ahead of the 2027 local body elections.

title: Dharmapuri district records 89.44 percent turnout — highest in Tamil Nadu
summary: Dharmapuri recorded a state-leading turnout of 89.44 percent in the 2026 election, the highest in Tamil Nadu, with election officials crediting saturation campaigning and clear weather.
